title: Aiko's Rifled enchantment
description: Enchantment that turns a crossbow into a gun
body:
Enchantment that turns your crossbow into a gun. Can be found in pillager outposts


functionally it increases the damage of crossbows letting it deal high damage. In exchange it can't go with quick charge.

"I think its fairly ballanced" - Aiko
